title: Exporting time tracking to excel for only one group
excerpt: When exporting the data from the time tracking column, it exports either just a single item or everything on the dashboard. I would love if it were possible to export time tracking data on a group by group basis instead …

posts.author: lyndsay.moye (Lyndsay Moye)
posts.cookedHtml: When exporting the data from the time tracking column, it exports either just a single item or everything on the dashboard. I would love if it were possible to export time tracking data on a group by group basis instead of it exporting all the groups in the dashboard.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there, my team actually created a custom coded solution in this area. It’s a board view that allows you to choose time tracking columns on multiple boards to pull excel reports from where the time is grouped by person/board. Maybe it’ll help some teams out in this area. It’s a private app and just a prototype for now but you can install it with this link. Let me know if you find it useful.
